subcodes.first_line: O servant at the threshold of Bahá'u'lláh! "Doctor" signifieth "Master," and "Humayun" meaneth "blessed." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده آستان حضرت بهاء الله دکتور بمعنی استاد است و همایون بمعنی مبارک
subcodes.subjects: @health and healing; material and spiritual healing, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @personal instructions, @assistance to the poor and lowly; the orphan; the sick
